name: Fish Tycoon PC Crimson Comet 20% Cure Fix
description: Repairs the original PC Crimson Comet curing branch with one 0..99 roll and success on 0..19.

output.default_folder_name: Fish Tycoon - Crimson Comet Bug Fix

settings.name: Crimson Comet 20% curing fix
settings.description: For each eligible diseased fish, roll 0..99 once; values 0..19 enter the original disease-clear and cure-counter block.

patches.note: Redirects only the broken sub_403240(0) call at VA 0x004204CE to the new wrapper at VA 0x00401E11.

patches.expected: CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC CC
patches.note: Uses 14 bytes of verified INT3 alignment padding between functions. Calls the original exclusive-upper-bound RNG helper once with 100, producing 0..99; compares AL with 20 and returns AL=1 only for 0..19 so the original test/jump enters the unchanged clear block. EAX is already 0..99, so its upper bytes are zero.
Updates the PE checksum from 0x000609B0 to 0x0006B452 for the final patched bytes. This is required for the modified executable to pass Windows loader validation on the tested system.
